notes: Redo generated with built-in image generation after inspecting the cozy Taco Tiger four-form sheet and the active V1 horror slice.
The accepted source sheet contains six pure robot subjects: four evolution stages, one static breacher-charge munition, and one disabled mechanical wreck defeat still.
The prompt explicitly prohibited tiger faces, animal heads, mouths, teeth, noses, whiskers, fur, paws, organic eyes, tacos, tortillas, lettuce, tomato, cheese, and motion-coded particle effects.
The transparent source alpha scan found exactly six groups with 73-102px clear gutters between visible pixels; grouped-mask slicing was used for clean isolated runtime frames.
